arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the target group.

arn_suffix.description: The ARN suffix for use with CloudWatch Metrics.

connection_termination.description: Indicates whether connection termination is enabled.

deregistration_delay.description: Time in seconds for deregistration delay.

health_check.description: Configuration block for health check settings.

id.description: The ID of the target group.

lambda_multi_value_headers_enabled.description: Indicates if multi-value headers are enabled for Lambda targets.

load_balancer_arns.description: A set of ARNs of the load balancers routing to this target group.

load_balancing_anomaly_mitigation.description: Type of anomaly mitigation for load balancing.

load_balancing_cross_zone_enabled.description: Indicates if cross-zone load balancing is enabled.

name.description: The name of the target group.

port.description: The port on which targets receive traffic.

preserve_client_ip.description: Indicates if client IP preservation is enabled.

protocol.description: The protocol to use for routing traffic.

proxy_protocol_v2.description: Indicates if Proxy Protocol v2 is enabled.

slow_start.description: The time in seconds for slow start mode.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the target group.

target_type.description: The type of targets that the target group routes requests to.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC for the target group.
